news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. board to review audited standalone & consolidated FY26 results on April 14, 2026.
Trading window closed for designated persons from April 1 to April 16, 2026, post results announcement.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. board to review audited standalone & consolidated FY26 results on April 14, 2026.
Trading window closed for designated persons from April 1 to April 16, 2026, post results announcement.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas received a tax order for FY19-20 to Sept 2024, totaling Rs.104.76 Cr.
The company plans to legally challenge the order, expecting no financial impact.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas received a tax order for FY19-20 to Sept 2024, totaling Rs.104.76 Cr.
The company plans to legally challenge the order, expecting no financial impact.

news.title:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).
news.summary:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).

news.title:
HSBC initiates Buy on Nuvoco Vistas Corp with a target price of Rs 420.
FY27 capacity peak, FY28 supply-demand gains, and price hikes to offset energy costs.
news.summary:
HSBC initiates Buy on Nuvoco Vistas Corp with a target price of Rs 420.
FY27 capacity peak, FY28 supply-demand gains, and price hikes to offset energy costs.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas' subsidiary Vadraj Cement allots 30,000 unsecured convertible debentures worth ₹300 Cr.
Debentures convert to 2,604 equity shares each, mandatory within 7 years or upon IPO filing.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas' subsidiary Vadraj Cement allots 30,000 unsecured convertible debentures worth ₹300 Cr.
Debentures convert to 2,604 equity shares each, mandatory within 7 years or upon IPO filing.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas issued Series B CCDs worth INR 300 Cr at 14.75% IRR via Vadraj.
Agreements include buyback, put options; Niyogi Enterprise holds 60.16% shares.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas issued Series B CCDs worth INR 300 Cr at 14.75% IRR via Vadraj.
Agreements include buyback, put options; Niyogi Enterprise holds 60.16% shares.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas received FY22-23 tax order proposing Rs.11.89 crore demand.
Management plans to contest disallowances, aligning with previous years.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas received FY22-23 tax order proposing Rs.11.89 crore demand.
Management plans to contest disallowances, aligning with previous years.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas clarified to BSE that its equity share volume surge on March 11, 2026, was market-driven.
The company stated no pending announcements or sensitive disclosures affecting stock price.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas clarified to BSE that its equity share volume surge on March 11, 2026, was market-driven.
The company stated no pending announcements or sensitive disclosures affecting stock price.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas acquired 100 shares of Algebra Endeavour Pvt Ltd.
Algebra holds Vadraj Energy; sellers were JSW Cement and Alpha Alternatives.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas acquired 100 shares of Algebra Endeavour Pvt Ltd.
Algebra holds Vadraj Energy; sellers were JSW Cement and Alpha Alternatives.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. to hold one-on-one investor meeting with HSBC Securities on Feb 4, 2026.
Meeting details may change due to unforeseen circumstances; updates provided as necessary.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. to hold one-on-one investor meeting with HSBC Securities on Feb 4, 2026.
Meeting details may change due to unforeseen circumstances; updates provided as necessary.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. Ltd. held an investor call on Q3 & 9M FY25 results.
The audio recording is available on the company's website for reference.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. Ltd. held an investor call on Q3 & 9M FY25 results.
The audio recording is available on the company's website for reference.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas aims for 35 MMTPA capacity by FY27 after Vadraj acquisition.
Capacity expansion also focuses on growth in the eastern region.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas aims for 35 MMTPA capacity by FY27 after Vadraj acquisition.
Capacity expansion also focuses on growth in the eastern region.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Nuvoco Vistas' ratings at AAA and AA with a Stable outlook.
CRISIL also reaffirmed A1 rating for short-term facilities, indicating credit stability.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Nuvoco Vistas' ratings at AAA and AA with a Stable outlook.
CRISIL also reaffirmed A1 rating for short-term facilities, indicating credit stability.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas reported record Q3 volume of 5 MMT, 7% YoY growth.
EBITDA rose 50% YoY to Rs. 386 Cr, revenue grew 12% to Rs. 2,701 Cr.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas reported record Q3 volume of 5 MMT, 7% YoY growth.
EBITDA rose 50% YoY to Rs. 386 Cr, revenue grew 12% to Rs. 2,701 Cr.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas to hold investor and analyst call on Jan 16, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 FY26 financial results, to be announced on Jan 15, 2026.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas to hold investor and analyst call on Jan 16, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 FY26 financial results, to be announced on Jan 15, 2026.

news.title:
Nuvoco, Birla, and JK Lakshmi Cement focus on premium products to sustain margins.
Analysts warn the strategy may fail long-term amid rising competition and GST changes.
news.summary:
Nuvoco, Birla, and JK Lakshmi Cement focus on premium products to sustain margins.
Analysts warn the strategy may fail long-term amid rising competition and GST changes.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. Ltd. announces an investor/analyst meeting on Dec 3, 2025.
The meeting with Nirmal Bang will be in person and one-on-one at 1 PM IST.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas Corp. Ltd. announces an investor/analyst meeting on Dec 3, 2025.
The meeting with Nirmal Bang will be in person and one-on-one at 1 PM IST.

news.title:
Cement firms see high single-digit volume growth in Q2 FY26.
They anticipate better H2 performance, driven by housing, infra projects.
news.summary:
Cement firms see high single-digit volume growth in Q2 FY26.
They anticipate better H2 performance, driven by housing, infra projects.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas saw trading volume 28.6x its 2-week avg by 9:55 AM.
37 lakh shares worth Rs. 143 crore traded; CMP Rs. 381.7, up 7.6%.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas saw trading volume 28.6x its 2-week avg by 9:55 AM.
37 lakh shares worth Rs. 143 crore traded; CMP Rs. 381.7, up 7.6%.

news.title:
Nuvoco Vistas of Nirma Group acquires Vadraj Energy's holding firm for INR2bn in cash.
Acquisition enhances power control for Nuvoco's western India plants amid rising energy costs.
news.summary:
Nuvoco Vistas of Nirma Group acquires Vadraj Energy's holding firm for INR2bn in cash.
Acquisition enhances power control for Nuvoco's western India plants amid rising energy costs.
